old_value: {"id":"TERP-306","title":"Repair targeted-e2e trust and pre-commit lint parity","description":"Lean tooling-trust repair lane. Scope: 1) make pre-merge and nightly Playwright exit codes truthful, 2) remove CI lint masking, 3) align lint-staged/pre-commit with the official lint contract, 4) rebaseline only the stale targeted critical-path specs and keep resolver/domain-map consumers in sync, 5) update the small set of docs that currently misstate the contract. Non-goals: new QA frameworks, resolver protocol redesign, branch-protection work, or broad critical-path rewrite.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"evan@evanmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-27T22:12:51Z","created_by":"Evan Tenenbaum","updated_at":"2026-03-27T22:12:51Z"}
